executive_summary: The Iran-US conflict remains at MAJOR severity with 407 incidents in 24h. The war has expanded geographically with Israel launching a ground incursion into southern Lebanon and Iranian strikes hitting the UAE (812 drones/186 missiles), Kuwait (178 missiles/384 drones), and the US embassy in Riyadh. US-Israeli interceptor stockpiles risk depletion within a week according to CNN. A targeted killing of the IRGC Quds Force Lebanon Corps commander was reported in Beirut. China and France are now actively pursuing diplomatic de-escalation.
whatsetails: Israeli ground forces launched incursion into southern Lebanon, killing senior Hezbollah commander (HIGH)
Iran launched major assault on UAE: 812 drones + 186 ballistic missiles; 3 killed, 755 drones/172 missiles intercepted
Kuwait Ministry confirms intercepting 178 ballistic missiles and 384 drones from Iran
Hezbollah intensifies rocket attacks: multiple barrages targeting Haifa, Galilee, Western Galilee
US embassy in Riyadh attacked with drones causing fire; Saudi Arabia condemns Iranian attack
Israeli airstrike in Isfahan killed three Iranian family members (HIGH)
Trump hints at deploying ground troops to Iran while threatening stronger strikes on Tehran
confirmed_events: IAEA confirmed US-Israeli strikes damaged entrances to Iran's underground Natanz uranium-enrichment facility
Death toll from US-Israeli strikes on Iran rises to 787 (Day 4)
Iranian ballistic missiles struck Tel Aviv and northern Israel (Kfar Yuval, Bet Shemesh) causing fires and civilian casualties
Hezbollah destroyed Israeli Merkava tank with guided missile in Kfarshouba, southern Lebanon
Saudi Arabia condemns Iranian attack on US embassy in Riyadh as 'cowardly and unjustified'
US closed embassies in Kuwait and Saudi Arabia as Iran widened strikes
UK Prime Minister Starmer considering deploying HMS Duncan warship to Middle East after RAF Cyprus strike
unverified_emerging: Report: Target of Beirut assassination is Lebanon Corps commander from Quds Force Daoud Ali Zada (source: unspecified Israeli report) — if confirmed, represents major escalation in IRGC-Israeli shadow war
UN calls for investigation into strike on school in Minab, Iran — attackers unidentified
US destroys Iranian drone mothership used for attacks (source: Daily Mail) — limited corroboration
Germany summons Iran's ambassador over Middle East escalation (source: TASS)

people_travel: Pakistan Aviation Authority denies airspace closure reports — airspace remains fully open
Suez Canal Authority: 56 ships crossed Tuesday carrying 2.6M tons; some major lines suspended transits pending developments
supply_chain: Oil supertanker rates hit all-time high as insurers withdraw war risk protection in Middle East
Fujairah port fire after drone interception; oil facility fire from drone debris — both contained, no injuries
Suez Canal operations continuing but some shipping lines pausing transits
market_macro: Egypt warns war will have major economic repercussions on entire world
CNN: US and Israeli interceptor stockpiles at risk of depletion within next week — potential air defense gap

outlook_24_72h.base_case: Conflict enters Day 4 with no signs of de-escalation. Iran continues mass missile/drone attacks on Gulf states and Israel while facing sustained US-Israeli airstrikes on Iranian territory. Israeli ground operation in Lebanon expands the geographic scope. Interceptor depletion risk creates pressure on US/Israeli air defense. Hezbollah and Houthi fronts remain active. China-France diplomatic effort may open channels but faces significant obstacles given leadership losses and kinetic intensity.
escalation_risks: Iranian missile/drone volUME overwhelming interceptor capacity leading to mass casualties in Gulf states or Israel
Hezbollah escalating to strategic rocket attacks on Israeli population centers
Israel targeting IRGC commanders in Beirut expanding covert war
Ground troop deployment by US (as hinted by Trump) would dramatically escalate
EU nations drawn in through British warship deployment, Cyprus base attacks
outlook_24_72h.de_escalation_pathways: China-France diplomatic push represents first major de-escalation effort. Iran claims no uranium enrichment at time of strikes (possible diplomatic opening). US domestic protests against war growing. However, Khamenei's death and IRGC decapitation strikes create powerful political momentum against compromise. Any ceasefire would require both sides to claim victory while preserving core interests — difficult given current intensity.
